title: google-labs-code/design.md
friendlyTitle: DESIGN.md gives coding agents design rules they can follow
summary: design.md defines a format for giving coding agents a persistent, structured understanding of a visual identity. A DESIGN.md file combines machine-readable design tokens in YAML front matter with human-readable Markdown guidance about typography, colors, layout, components, and design rationale.
friendlySummary: This repo proposes a simple file format for describing colors, fonts, spacing, components, and design rules for AI coding agents.
whyItMatters: Teams can use it to make AI-generated interfaces more consistent with an existing brand or design system. It is especially useful when agents need both exact token values and plain-English guidance about how those choices should be applied.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when you want AI-built screens to match your brand instead of looking like generic prompt soup.
